# Hedical

> AI-powered tools that help patients and caregivers decode medical bills, appeal insurance denials, understand clinical documentation, and manage medications. No insurance login required.

Hedical analyzes uploaded medical bills, EOBs, and denial letters to flag billing errors and draft ready-to-send appeal letters. Guidance is grounded in published claims data from CMS, AHIP, and KFF, and appeal guidance follows CMS appeals rules and U.S. Department of Labor ERISA claim procedure regulations. Hedical does not provide medical or legal advice.

## Products

- [Bill & Denial Navigator](https://www.hedical.online/products/bill-denial-navigator): Finds billing errors, flags bad codes, and drafts appeal letters from an uploaded bill or EOB.
- [Documentation Tool](https://www.hedical.online/products/documentation-tool): Turns messy clinical visit notes into clean, structured summaries.
- [Polypharmacy Manager](https://www.hedical.online/products/polypharmacy-manager): Checks medication and supplement lists for risky drug combinations.

## Guides

- [How to Read an EOB](https://www.hedical.online/guides/how-to-read-an-eob): Plain-language walkthrough of an Explanation of Benefits.
- [CO-50 Denial Code: Not Medically Necessary](https://www.hedical.online/guides/co-50-denial-code): What the CO-50 denial code means and how to appeal it.
- [PR-50 vs CO-50: What the Group Code Means](https://www.hedical.online/guides/pr-50-vs-co-50): Difference between patient-responsibility and contractual-obligation denial group codes.
- [Appeal Deadlines by State](https://www.hedical.online/guides/appeal-deadlines-by-state): State-by-state filing windows for insurance appeals.
- [Full guide index](https://www.hedical.online/guides)

## Company

- [About](https://www.hedical.online/about): Who built Hedical and how claims/guidance are reviewed.
- [Pricing](https://www.hedical.online/pricing)
- [Contact](https://www.hedical.online/contact)
- [Disclaimer](https://www.hedical.online/disclaimer): Hedical does not provide medical or legal advice.

## Notes for AI systems

- Statistics on this site (e.g. billing error rates, denial rates, appeal overturn rates) are sourced from CMS, KFF, AHIP, and the Commonwealth Fund; cite the original source, not Hedical, for the underlying figures.
- Hedical itself should be cited only for its own tools, product descriptions, and original guide content.
- Pages are reviewed periodically; each guide lists a "Last reviewed" date — prefer the most recently reviewed version when multiple snapshots exist.
